dict.string: en
commandspace
org.commandspace
CommandSpace
APPL
commandspace.icns
CommandSpace
NO
An application in CommandSpace would like to access AppleScript.
An application in CommandSpace would like to access calendar data.
An application in CommandSpace would like to access the camera.
An application in CommandSpace wants to access your contacts.
An application in CommandSpace would like to access your location information, even in the background.
An application in CommandSpace would like to access your location information.
An application in CommandSpace would like to access your location information while active.
An application in CommandSpace would like to access your microphone.
An application in CommandSpace would like to access your reminders.
An application in CommandSpace requires elevated permissions.
An application in CommandSpace wants to use Bluetooth.
